name: tq-workspace
description: pnpm workspace for the JS packages published from the tq repo (@reddb-io/toon).

scripts.version: bash scripts/sync-version.sh "$npm_package_version" && git add -- Cargo.toml Cargo.lock crates/tq/Cargo.toml package.json packages/toon/package.json packages/toon/src/version.js packages/vscode-toon/package.json
